---
name: 📦 New Compatibility Rule
about: Add or update a dependency migration rule
title: "[RULE] "
labels: compatibility-rule
assignees: Ayoubbooob
---

## Dependency

- **GroupId**: <!-- e.g. io.springfox -->
- **ArtifactId**: <!-- e.g. springfox-swagger2 -->
- **Current Version**: <!-- e.g. 3.0.0 -->

## Migration Path

- **From Spring Boot**: <!-- e.g. 2.7.x -->
- **To Spring Boot**: <!-- e.g. 3.2.x -->

## Status

<!-- Pick one -->
- [ ] NEEDS_UPDATE — works but requires version bump
- [ ] REPLACED — replaced by a different artifact
- [ ] REMOVED — no longer available
- [ ] INCOMPATIBLE — cannot work with target version

## Replacement (if applicable)

- **New GroupId**: <!-- e.g. org.springdoc -->
- **New ArtifactId**: <!-- e.g. springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui -->
- **Minimum Version**: <!-- e.g. 2.3.0 -->

## Notes

<!-- Why this change is needed, migration guide link, etc. -->

## Source

<!-- Link to official docs, release notes, or migration guide that confirms this -->
